title: Criteria Ratings Pts
content:
Criteria Ratings Pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeEvaluation
Weekly Writing Warmup assessment criteria.
100 pts
Full Credit
Submission reflects completion of the guidelines and prompts outlined in the instructions and the required time spent writing.
50 pts
Partial Credit
Submission reflects on at least half of the guidelines and prompts outlined in the instructions and the required time spent writing.
0 pts
No Credit
Submission does not reflect completion of the guidelines or prompts outlined in the instructions and time spent writing.
100 pts
Total Points: 100


Week 5 | Discussion: Persuasive Passage

Persuasive Passage
Instructions
Your discussion will occur in class.

Discussion Topic
Write a persuasive passage using strong logic and a clear claim for our discussion. Choose a topic that will help you to develop an effective persuasive passage.

Tips: Use strong transitions to help your reader go from point to point. Your passage should contain a thesis statement and be well-proofread.
context: From document: Weeks 1 - 6 Canvas Data Dump — chunk 149 (chunk 149/188)
